title: Wizards of the Industrial Age
description: This Project adds Wizardry how it might have been in the Industrial Age
body:
⚙️ Overview

Wizards of the Industrial Age is a feature-rich NeoForge modpack built for me and my friends.
It blends the mechanical depth of Create with the magical systems of Iron’s Spells n’ Spellbooks, creating a world where engineering and sorcery coexist in harmony.

Build vast automated factories, forge arcane tools, and experiment with both magic and machinery to progress through a world where imagination fuels invention.

🔩 What to Expect

🧙 Industrial Sorcery: Master advanced spellcasting while constructing powerful automated systems and machines.

⚙️ Balanced Tech & Magic: A carefully tuned experience where both Create and Iron’s Spells n’ Spellbooks shine equally.

🏭 Creative Engineering: Design magical production lines, enchanted devices, and hybrid contraptions powered by both mana and mechanics.

🌍 Smooth Performance: Includes optimization and client improvements for large-scale builds and effects.

👥 Multiplayer Friendly: Works seamlessly for both solo play and cooperative sessions with friends.

💬 Notes

Originally created for a small group of friends, this modpack combines the creativity of automation with the depth of spellcasting for a balanced, progression-driven experience. Whether you prefer gears or glyphs, there’s always something new to master.
